name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Fork ownership *)
ForkOwner(i) == forks[i]

(* Next action *)
Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ IsThinking(i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ IsHungry(i)
        /\ ForkOwner(LEFT(i)) = "free"
        /\ ForkOwner(RIGHT(i)) = "free"
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
  \/ \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ IsEating(i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery

  \* Each process i
  \* 1. flag[i] := TRUE
  \* 2. num[i] := 1 + Max(num)
  \* 3. flag[i] := FALSE

  \* 5. Critical section
  \* 6. num[i] := 0
end

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
          /\ head \in 1..K
          /\ tail \in 1..K
          /\ count \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, r)
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \notin readers
          /\ \E r \in Seq(1..10) : /\ r \in readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS M, N, NULL

VARIABLES state, channel, snapshot, marker, finished
TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [N -> M]
  /\ channel \in [N -> [N -> Seq(M)]]
  /\ snapshot \in [N -> [N -> Seq(M)]]
  /\ marker \in [N -> [N -> BOOLEAN]]
  /\ finished \in [N -> BOOLEAN]

\* Init sets all processes to have no local state, empty channels, no markers received, and not finished
Init ==
  /\ state = [p \in N |-> NULL]
  /\ channel = [p \in N |-> [q \in N |-> <<>>]]
  /\ snapshot = [p \in N |-> [q \in N |-> <<>>]]
  /\ marker = [p \in N |-> [q \in N |-> FALSE]]
  /\ finished = [p \in N |-> FALSE]

\* Next describes the possible actions in the system
Next ==
  \/ \E p \in N : \E q \in N :
       /\ state[p] = NULL
       /\ finished[p] = FALSE
       /\ marker[p][q] = FALSE
       /\ channel[p][q] = <<>>
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NULL]
       /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = <<>>]
       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p][q] = <<>>]
       /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![p][q] = FALSE]
       /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, snapshot, marker, finished>>
  \/ \E p \in N : \E q \in N :
       /\ state[p] \in M
       /\ finished[p] = FALSE
       /\ marker[p][q] = FALSE
       /\ channel[p][q] = <<>>
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NULL]
       /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = <<>>]
       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p][q] = <<>>]
       /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![p][q] = FALSE]
       /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, snapshot, marker, finished>>
  \/ \E p \in N : \E q \in N :
       /\ state[p] \in M
       /\ finished[p] = FALSE
       /\ marker[p][q] = FALSE
       /\ channel[p][q] \in Seq(M)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = state[p]]
       /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Tail(channel[p][q])]
       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p][q] = Append(snapshot[p][q], Head(channel[p][q]))]
       /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![p][q] = FALSE]
       /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, snapshot, marker, finished>>
  \/ \E p \in N : \E q \in N :
       /\ state[p] = NULL
       /\ finished[p] = FALSE
       /\ marker[p][q] = FALSE
       /\ channel[p][q] \in Seq(M)
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NULL]
       /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![p][q] = Tail(channel[p][q])]
       /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p][q] = Append(snapshot[p][q], Head(channel[p][q]))]
       /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT ![p][q] = FALSE]
       /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets, epsilon

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ epsilon \in Nat
        /\ epsilon > 0

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]]
          /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + (Avg - clocks[i])]
          /\ epsilon' = epsilon
        /\ \A j \in 1..N:
          /\ clocks[j] <= clocks'[j]
          /\ clocks'[j] <= clocks[j] + offsets[j]
        /\ \A j \in 1..N:
          /\ offsets[j] <= offsets'[j]
          /\ offsets'[j] <= offsets[j] + (Avg - clocks[j])
        /\ Avg = (1 \div N) * \Sum_{k \in 1..N} clocks[k]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets, epsilon>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ allocated \subseteq [Client -> SUBSET Pages]
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in DOMAIN allocated: \A p \in allocated[c]: p \in Pages
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in DOMAIN allocated: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0

Next == \/ /\ turn = 0
           /\ wants = 0
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ wants' = 0
       \/ /\ turn = 0
           /\ wants = 1
           /\ turn' = 0
           /\ wants' = 1
       \/ /\ turn = 1
           /\ wants = 0
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ wants' = 0
       \/ /\ turn = 1
           /\ wants = 1
           /\ turn' = 1
           /\ wants' = 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
